prompt: This document is to be published on the UK GOV.UK government website. It may apply to one or more of the nations of the UK (England, Wales, Scotland or Northern Ireland). State whether it applies to scotland and give a short explanation (less than 100 words) for your decision.
reason: This document pertains specifically to the regulatory framework for teacher misconduct in England, as indicated by references to the Teachers’ Disciplinary (England) Regulations 2012. It does not apply to Scotland, which has its own distinct educational and regulatory system.
